title: Lift Lighthouse Performance 65 -> 85+ across all 6 sampled pages

diagnosis.main_blocker: Vanilla JS pattern bundles entire app into index.html. Member on iPhone over cellular sees slow first paint.
diagnosis.deps_runtime: Only chalk (1 prod dep). 1.1MB is all app code.
diagnosis.code_split_present: vite.config.js declares IMMEDIATE_PAGES + DEFERRED_PAGES but actual code-split-on-route may not be working as expected.

phase_1_quick_wins: Audit vite manualChunks — is splitting actually firing per-page?
Lazy-route via dynamic import on first navigation to each page (router-level, not bundle-time)
Compress images: course-placeholder.jpg, Logo.jpg, flag-logo.jpg, watermark - WebP + responsive sizes
Inline only critical above-the-fold CSS; defer rest with rel=preload
phase_2_architecture: Service worker pre-cache strategy for member-facing static assets
Brotli compression at GitHub Pages level (HTTP headers via .nojekyll + manifest)
phase_3_micro_optimizations: Replace any sync handicap calculation with web worker for large round sets

depends_on: W1.A5 home.js split lands first (separating page concerns clears the path for per-route lazy load)
acceptance_criteria: Lighthouse Performance >= 80 on all 6 sampled pages
First Contentful Paint < 2s on Slow 4G simulation
No regression in member-facing UX (verify via Tier 2 Playwright)
